title: hahaland Baby Toys Baby Books 0-6 Months, Soft Cloth Newborn Sensory Books Toy for Babies, Touch Feel Activity Soft Book Infants Toys for 0 3 6 12 months Boy Girl Shower Gifts
features: Interactive: Peek-a-Boo Forest is an interactive soft book that allows your little explorer to adventure into the woods and discover the friendly animals that live in the forest. This soft book for babies features crinkly flaps and 3D features for your child to interact with that aid in developing hand-eye coordination. Easy for little fingers to open and close, a fun peek-a-boo flap design supports fine motor skills

Colorful Pages: hahaland baby books 0-6 months feature bright, bold colors, friendly characters, and engaging patterns to attract your baby's attention and promote visual development; Babies will start to love touching them for the crinkly material and flipping through the pages, which helps them learn different types of words and colors. Multiple textures and surprise crinkles encourage exploration which makes it fun for babies and toddlers to discover, learn, and read

Durable & Easy to Carry: This soft book for babies 6 months and up features durable cloth pages that are easy to wash; The Peek-a-Boo Forest cloth book isn't just a source of joy during playtime; its versatility shines as it easily hangs on the stroller, transforming outings into engaging adventures. The lightweight design and secure attachment make it a practical and delightful companion on the go

All for Baby's Safe: The baby book is made from BPA-free cloth and is soft to touch and chew, easy to use by baby without getting hurt. No small or loose parts to avoid choking hazards and the stitching is strong enough to withstand chewing. Baby will play with the soft books in different ways as they grow. The first beginning is to touch and feel them. Once start teething, babies play by bringing books to their mouth, safely exploring these baby toys, help soothe gums

User-friendly Hanging Strap Design: Unlike other velcro hanging straps with limited load-bearing capacity, ours is an improved closed hanging strap that can be used with hooks and hung anywhere such as a stroller, car seat, and so on, which is convenient for baby to pull at will and not fall off easily. This baby book is a wonderful newborn baby girl-boy gift. If there is any issue after use, let us know and we will get back to you with a satisfactory solution
description: Product Description Bonding Moments That Grow with Every Page Create soothing routines and playful learning Snuggled in your lap, your baby explores colours, textures, and forest animals — all while hearing the warmth of your voice. This soft activity book is more than a toy; it's a gentle introduction to sensory development and parent-baby bonding. Whether it’s tummy time, bedtime or quiet mornings, these cloth pages turn into moments of connection and discovery. A thoughtful gift for newborns and new parents alike.
